_doc: Per-room (per-SCENE) access logic. A scene under `scenes` is AUTHORED: it
gets EXACTLY its `from` edges and its default (zone-gated) edge is dropped.
Author zone-by-zone; every location-bearing scene in a zone must be
reachable through authored edges before that zone is considered done.
`from`: list of [source, requirement]. source = scene id (S_xxxx) or a zone
name (zone-region entry). requirement = list ANDed; a nested list = OR-group;
names match items.json. Items named here are auto-promoted to progression.
`locations`: per-location region override (location name -> scene/zone) for
chests/drops physically reached from a different room than their script
scene. See data/room_graph_notes.md for the mapping rationale.
STATUS: Wailing Blue authored (full vanilla map, Hugo). Other zones still on
the coarse zone-medallion default until mapped.
_interim_notes: S_1010 gate is [Bronze Key, Mask of Eyes] = the prerequisites to reach the
S_1012 Gemma Room cutscene that grants the (currently NON-randomized) Blue
Necklace. When the Blue Necklace is added to the pool (its missing event
location), change this gate to ["Blue Necklace"]. See room_graph_notes.md.
